title: Q1 2026 Board Meeting Compliance Summary
body:
COMPLIANCE STATUS OVERVIEW

TechCorp maintains a strong compliance posture with no open regulatory violations as of March 1, 2026. Our compliance operations continue to reflect adherence to applicable legal and regulatory requirements across all operational domains. All prior audit findings have been remediated, and our internal control environment remains effective and operational. This summary provides the Board with an overview of key compliance milestones and forward-looking compliance initiatives for Q2 and beyond.

SOC 2 TYPE II AUDIT — Q2 2026 SCHEDULED

We are actively preparing for our SOC 2 Type II audit, currently scheduled to commence in Q2 2026. <cite index="1-13">SOC 2 Type II assesses the design and operating effectiveness of controls over a defined period, usually between three and twelve months.</cite> Our audit scope encompasses security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy controls across all customer-facing services. In support of this initiative, we have: (i) finalized our control design documentation and mapped all in-scope systems and processes; (ii) begun continuous evidence collection and control testing to ensure operational effectiveness throughout the audit window; and (iii) coordinated with our external audit firm to confirm timelines, scope boundaries, and reporting expectations. This certification will enhance customer confidence and support our sales efforts with enterprise prospects who require SOC 2 Type II certification as a procurement requirement.

GDPR DATA PROCESSING AGREEMENT UPDATES — Q1 2026 COMPLETED

During Q1 2026, we executed updated Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) with three new vendors who process personal data on our behalf or in connection with our service delivery. <cite index="11-8">Article 28(3) of GDPR requires that controllers, processors, and sub-processors must enter into written contracts, or data processing agreements, in order to share personal data.</cite> Each DPA incorporat
